title: Blocks of fresh air
description: designed to give minecraft a fresh coat of paint and make it more immersive.
body:
![The cover art for blocks of fresh air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06698c288f82d7a0fb4584c969ad1122fc9032be.png)
# **Blocks of fresh air**

This modpack is designed to make minecraft more immersive, without ruining any core progression. 
It has many combinations of resource packs to use, dont want a full reskin of the game? pick and choose what you want in the resource pack tab.


# **Features**
fresh air is mostly a visual overhaul, but a few changes are:
- Distant Horizons
- Overhauled terrain
- Hold my items
- Gorgeous shader packs
- Immersive sounds and particle effects
- Intenser mobs (without any ai changes!)
- MANY optimization mods
And many more, go see for yourself!
